channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Want to improve your agility? Try these 'explosive power' exercises
item.description: These simple movements combine speed and strength to train your body's ability to rapidly generate force. They can also help prevent injury and boost ...

item.title: A new survey on dads found that 9 out of 10 had a surprising reaction to fatherhood
item.description: Men are traditionally thought of as providers for their children. But a report that interviewed thousands of fathers found them embracing another role...

item.title: Released from Cambodia's scam compounds, trafficking victims encounter a new emergency
item.description: A crackdown on scam centers in Cambodia has led to thousands of stranded foreign workers wandering Phnom Penh's streets.

item.title: DOJ memo raises fears among disability advocates of a return to institutionalization
item.description: The Justice Department's opinion challenges civil rights protections that have long considered institutionalization of disabled Americans a last resort.
